docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, YING AS TO DEFENDANT BECK, RENE
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 01/24/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELIZABETH ZARCH; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
